zh.lifeSummary: 當John Munning於1430年出生在英國素福爾可內吉時，他的父親Henry Munning22歲，母親Elizabeth Charles18歲。他於大約1455年與Margaret Woodward在英國素福爾可諾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1486年4月24日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可內吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Munning于1430年出生在英国素福爾可內吉时，他的父亲Henry Munning22岁，母亲Elizabeth Charles18岁。他于大约1455年与Margaret Woodward在英国素福爾可諾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1486年4月24日在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可內吉。

nameMeanings.name: Munning
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English * Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund).

variants.name: Munnings
meanings: English (Suffolk): variant of Munning, with post-medieval excrescent -s. Munning is from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund). This form of the surname is the more common one in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Munning was born in 1430, in Nedging, Suffolk, England, his father, Henry Munning, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Charles, was 18. He married Margaret Woodward about 1455, in Norton, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 24 April 1486, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Nedging, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Munning est né en 1430, à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Henry Munning, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Charles, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Woodward environ 1455, à Norton, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1486, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Munning 1430 in Nedging, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Munning 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Charles 18. Er hat um 1455 in Norton, Suffolk, England Margaret Woodward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 24. April 1486 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nedging, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Munning è nato il nel 1430 nel Nedging, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Henry Munning, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Charles, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Woodward circa 1455, nel Norton, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 24 aprile 1486, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Nedging, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Munningが1430年にイギリススフォルクネドジングで生まれた時，父Henry Munningは22歳，母Elizabeth Charlesは18歳であった。約1455年にイギリススフォルクノートンでMargaret Woodwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1486年4月24日に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクネドジングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Munning(이)가 1430년 영국 수폴크 네지잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Munning(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Charles(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1455년 영국 수폴크 노르턴에서 Margaret Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1486년 4월 24일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 네지잉에 묻혔다.

mn., Norton, Suffolk, England: Norton, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Munning nasceu em 1430, em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Munning, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Charles, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Woodward aproximadamente 1455, em Norton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1486, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Munning родился в 1430 г. в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Munning было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Charles, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Woodward около 1455 г. в местности нортон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 24 апреля 1486 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Munning nació en 1430, en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Munning, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Charles, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret Woodward aproximadamente 1455, en Norton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 24 de abril de 1486, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
